schema.appDescription: Calculate your monthly APY contribution for a guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000/month at age 60. Based on your current age.

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the APY Calculator. All inputs have smart defaults.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type — no submit button needed.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown table to see how your numbers change over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust the inputs to compare different scenarios and find the best option.

faq.a: APY is a government-backed pension scheme for unorganised sector workers. It guarantees a fixed monthly pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 from age 60. Both employee and (for eligible subscribers) the government contribute. On death, the spouse gets the same pension; on spouse's death, the nominee gets the corpus.
Any Indian citizen aged 18–40 with a savings bank account is eligible. However, income taxpayers are not eligible. Enrolment is through banks and post offices. The NPS trust manages the APY corpus.

faq.q: What is the government co-contribution under APY?
faq.a: The government contributed 50% of the subscriber's contribution or ₹1,000/year (whichever is lower) for 5 years (2015–20) for eligible subscribers. New subscribers from FY 2022 onwards who are income taxpayers are not eligible for government co-contribution.
Yes, the APY Calculator on CalcPhi is completely free with no registration required.
No. All calculations run in your browser. We do not store any financial data.

faq.q: Can I use the APY Calculator on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. CalcPhi is fully mobile-optimised and works on all modern smartphones.

examples.heading: 28-year-old targeting ₹3,000/month pension
examples.text: A 28-year-old subscribing to APY for ₹3,000/month pension contributes ₹376/month for 32 years (total ₹1,44,192). At 60, they receive ₹3,000/month (₹36,000/year) guaranteed for life.

examples.heading: Starting late at 35 for ₹5,000/month pension
examples.text: Joining APY at 35 for ₹5,000/month pension requires ₹902/month for 25 years (total ₹2,70,600). The corpus at 60 is ₹8.5 lakh. Starting at 25 for the same pension requires only ₹376/month — early start saves significantly.
